name: Case Study
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must be perfect in my work to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't meet expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Overworking and taking on too many responsibilities to prove competence.
situation: Recalling a prior interaction with HR that involved feeling judged during medical leave.
auto_thought: They think I'm not capable because of my health condition.
behavior: Avoidance of seeking help or reducing workload, leading to burnout.
